scripts.security:check: powershell -Command "Write-Host '[Daily Security Check]'; Write-Host '1. Checking Security Headers...'; try { $headers = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://christrevolutionministries.org -Method HEAD | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Headers; if (-not (Test-Path logs/security)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs/security }; $headers | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File -FilePath './logs/security/headers.json'; Write-Host 'Headers saved to logs/security/headers.json' } catch { Write-Host 'Error checking headers: ' + $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Host '2. Checking SSL Certificate...'; try { $cert = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://christrevolutionministries.org | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Certificate; $cert | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File -FilePath './logs/security/certificate.json'; Write-Host 'Certificate info saved to logs/security/certificate.json' } catch { Write-Host 'Error checking certificate: ' + $_.Exception.Message }"
scripts.security:monitor: npm run security:check && npm run security:csp
